title: Open Cloze: The History of Football

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Although various forms of ball games have existed 1.1. _________ ancient times, the sport we now call football took shape in nineteenth-century England. Before standardised rules were introduced, different schools played by their 1.2. _________ sets of regulations, which often led to confusion and disputes. It was not 1.3. _________ 1863, when the Football Association was established in London, that a unified code of rules was finally agreed upon.

The game quickly gained 1.4. _________ across Europe and South America, where it became deeply rooted in local cultures. The first World Cup, 1.5. _________ in Uruguay in 1930, attracted just thirteen participating nations. Today, the tournament draws over two hundred teams, making it the most widely followed sporting 1.6. _________ on Earth.

Over the years, football has produced a 1.7. _________ of legendary figures, from Pele and Maradona to Messi and Ronaldo. These players have not only demonstrated extraordinary 1.8. _________ on the pitch but have also served as role models for millions. Looking 1.9. _________, there is every reason to believe that football will continue to thrive, 1.10. _________ the fact that it faces growing competition from other forms of entertainment.
